items.title_zh: 欧盟公布新钢铁配额的国别分配与管理办法
items.title_original: Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2026/1457 of 29 June 2026 on the distribution of tariff quotas opened under Regulation (EU) 2026/1384 addressing the negative trade-related effects of global overcapacity on the Union steel market
items.summary_zh: 欧盟实施条例（EU）2026/1457对26类钢铁产品的关税配额进行国别及残余配额分配，明确最惠国与自贸协定配额池、先到先得管理、配额退回以及非优惠原产地规则。条例适用于2026年7月1日至12月31日。
items.impact_zh: 中国钢材进入欧盟必须按产品类别和可用配额池申报；配额耗尽后适用50%配额外附加税。出口前应同时核对具体Order Number、原产地资格及既有贸易救济税。

source.name: EUR-Lex / 欧盟官方公报

items.summary_en: The EU Implementing Regulation (EU) 2026/1457 allocates tariff quotas for 26 categories of steel products by country and residual quotas, clarifying the most-favored-nation and free trade agreement quota pools, first-come-first-served management, quota returns, and non-preferential origin rules. The regulation is applicable from July 1 to December 31, 2026.
items.title_en: EU Implements New Tariff Quota Distribution and Management for Steel
items.impact_en: Chinese steel products entering the EU must be declared according to product categories and available quota pools; a 50% additional tariff applies once quotas are exhausted. Exporters should verify specific Order Numbers, origin qualifications, and existing trade remedy duties before export.

items.title_zh: 欧盟钢铁新规正式建立18,345,922吨关税配额及50%配额外税率
items.title_original: Regulation (EU) 2026/1384 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 17 June 2026 addressing the negative trade-related effects of global overcapacity on the Union steel market and amending Regulation (EU) 2020/2170
items.summary_zh: 欧盟以（EU）2026/1384建立新的钢铁进口制度，为26类产品开放合计18,345,922吨关税配额，并规定50%的配额外附加税率；后续国别分配由实施条例具体落实。
items.impact_zh: 该法规改变中国钢材进入欧盟的基础准入成本。中国出口商应把产品类别、配额余量和既有反倾销/反补贴措施纳入同一报价与清关测算。

source.name: EUR-Lex / 欧盟官方公报

items.summary_en: The EU Regulation (EU) 2026/1384 establishes a new steel import system, opening a total of 18,345,922 tons of tariff quotas for 26 categories of products and stipulating a 50% additional tariff rate; subsequent country allocations will be implemented by the implementing regulation.
items.title_en: EU Establishes New Steel Import System with 18,345,922 Tons Tariff Quota and 50% Additional Tariff Rate
items.impact_en: This regulation changes the basic entry cost for Chinese steel products into the EU. Chinese exporters should incorporate product categories, quota balances, and existing anti-dumping/subsidy measures into the same quotation and customs clearance calculations.

items.title_zh: 英国自2026年7月1日起的钢铁贸易措施
items.title_en: UK's steel trade measure from 1 July 2026
items.title_original: UK's steel trade measure from 1 July 2026
items.summary_zh: 英国政府宣布自2026年7月1日起实施新的钢铁贸易措施，限制免税钢铁进口配额，整体配额量较钢铁保障措施减少51%。超出配额的进口将面临50%的关税。
items.summary_en: The UK government announced a new steel trade measure effective from 1 July 2026, limiting tariff-free steel import quota volumes by 51% compared to the steel safeguard measure. Imports exceeding these quotas will face a 50% tariff.
items.impact_zh: 这一措施将显著影响中国钢材出口到英国的机会，尤其是对那些能够在英国生产的钢铁产品，可能导致出口成本增加。
items.impact_en: This measure will significantly impact the opportunities for Chinese steel exports to the UK, particularly for steel products that can also be produced in the UK, potentially increasing export costs.

source.name: GOV.UK / 英国政府

items.title_zh: 英国自2026年7月起收紧钢铁进口配额并将配额外税率提高至50%
items.title_original: UK's steel trade measure from 1 July 2026
items.summary_zh: 英国政府自2026年7月1日起实施新的钢铁贸易措施：免税配额总量较原保障措施减少51%，超过配额的进口钢材适用50%关税；措施针对英国能够生产的钢铁产品，并列有特定产品安排。
items.impact_zh: 对中国出口的直接影响是免税空间明显收缩、超配额成本上升。应逐项核对产品类别、国别配额、排除产品以及与反倾销税并用的规则。

source.name: GOV.UK / 英国政府

items.summary_en: The UK government will implement new steel trade measures from July 1, 2026: the total amount of duty-free quotas will be reduced by 51% compared to the original safeguard measures, and imports exceeding the quota will be subject to a 50% tariff; the measures target steel products that can be produced in the UK and include specific product arrangements.
products_en: steel products produced in the UK
items.title_en: UK Tightens Steel Import Quotas and Raises Additional Tariff Rate to 50% from July 1, 2026
items.impact_en: The direct impact on Chinese exports is a significant reduction in duty-free space and increased costs for exceeding quotas. Each product category, country quota, excluded products, and rules related to anti-dumping duties should be verified item by item.

items.title_zh: 中国某些不可重复使用钢气瓶的反倾销税令的加速首次日落审查最终结果
items.title_original: Certain Non-Refillable Steel Cylinders From the People's Republic of China: Final Results of the Expedited First Sunset Review of the Antidumping Duty Order
items.summary_zh: 美国商务部发现，撤销对中国某些不可重复使用钢气瓶的反倾销税令可能导致倾销的持续或再发生。
items.impact_zh: 这意味着中国制造的不可重复使用钢气瓶在美国市场将继续面临反倾销税，影响其市场竞争力。

source.name: U.S. Federal Register / 美国联邦公报

items.summary_en: The U.S. Department of Commerce found that revoking the antidumping duty order on certain non-refillable steel cylinders from China could lead to the continuation or recurrence of dumping.
items.title_en: Final Results of the Expedited First Sunset Review of Antidumping Duty Order on Certain Non-Refillable Steel Cylinders from China
items.impact_en: This means that non-refillable steel cylinders manufactured in China will continue to face antidumping duties in the U.S. market, affecting their market competitiveness.

items.title_zh: 中国某些合金和碳钢螺纹杆的反倾销税行政审查最终结果；2024-2025
items.title_original: Alloy and Certain Carbon Steel Threaded Rod From the People's Republic of China: Final Results of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review; 2024-2025
items.summary_zh: 美国商务部确定，中国出口商在审查期间以低于正常价值的价格销售合金和某些碳钢螺纹杆。
items.impact_zh: 这将导致中国相关产品在美国市场的竞争力下降，可能需要调整定价策略以应对反倾销措施。

source.name: U.S. Federal Register / 美国联邦公报

items.summary_en: The U.S. Department of Commerce determined that Chinese exporters sold alloy and certain carbon steel threaded rods at prices below normal value during the review period.
items.title_en: Final Results of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review on Certain Alloy and Carbon Steel Threaded Rod from China; 2024-2025
items.impact_en: This will lead to a decrease in the competitiveness of related Chinese products in the U.S. market, potentially requiring adjustments in pricing strategies to cope with antidumping measures.

items.title_zh: 准备应对碳边界调整机制（CBAM）
items.title_en: Prepare for the Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
items.title_original: Prepare for the Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
items.summary_zh: 碳边界调整机制（CBAM）将于2027年1月1日生效，针对从铝、水泥、化肥、氢气和钢铁行业进口的特定商品征收税费。
items.summary_en: The Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) comes into effect on 1 January 2027, taxing specific goods imported from the aluminium, cement, fertiliser, hydrogen, and iron and steel sectors.
items.impact_zh: 这意味着中国钢铁出口商在进入英国市场时需考虑碳排放税的影响，可能增加成本和合规要求。
items.impact_en: This means that Chinese steel exporters will need to consider the impact of carbon emissions taxes when entering the UK market, potentially increasing costs and compliance requirements.

source.name: GOV.UK / 英国政府

items.title_zh: 中国某些钢架及其零部件的反倾销税行政审查结果不一致的法院裁决通知
items.title_original: Certain Steel Racks and Parts Thereof From the People's Republic of China: Notice of Court Decision Not in Harmony With the Results of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review; Notice of Amended Final Results
items.summary_zh: 美国国际贸易法院对中国某些钢架的反倾销税行政审查结果作出裁决，要求修正相关倾销幅度。
items.impact_zh: 这可能导致中国钢架产品在美国市场的倾销幅度调整，影响其市场准入和价格策略。

source.name: U.S. Federal Register / 美国联邦公报

items.summary_en: The U.S. International Trade Court ruled on the results of the antidumping duty administrative review on certain steel racks from China, requiring a correction of the relevant dumping margins.
items.title_en: Notice of Court Decision Not in Harmony with the Results of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review on Certain Steel Racks and Parts Thereof from China
items.impact_en: This may lead to adjustments in the dumping margins for Chinese steel rack products in the U.S. market, affecting their market access and pricing strategies.

items.title_zh: 碳边界调整机制（CBAM）证书的销售和回购
items.title_en: Sale and repurchase of CBAM certificates
items.title_original: Sale and repurchase of CBAM certificates
items.summary_zh: 该委托法将规定通过成员国和委员会之间的共同采购程序，在一个共同的中央平台上销售和回购碳边界调整机制（CBAM）证书的条件。
items.summary_en: This Delegated Act will set out the conditions for the sale and re-purchase of carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM) certificates through a common central platform following a joint procurement procedure between Member States and the Commission.
items.impact_zh: 对中国钢厂/出口商意味着需要关注CBAM证书的销售和回购机制，以便在进入欧盟市场时符合相关规定。
items.impact_en: For Chinese steel mills/exporters, this means they need to pay attention to the sale and repurchase mechanism of CBAM certificates to comply with regulations when entering the EU market.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 中国某些耐腐蚀钢产品的反倾销和补贴税令的规避调查启动通知
items.title_original: Certain Corrosion-Resistant Steel Products From the People's Republic of China: Initiation of Circumvention Inquiry on the Antidumping and Countervailing Duty Orders
items.summary_zh: 美国商务部启动对中国某些耐腐蚀钢产品的规避调查，以确定其是否通过泰国进行规避。
items.impact_zh: 如果调查结果确认规避，将对中国耐腐蚀钢产品的市场准入产生重大影响，可能导致更严格的贸易限制。

source.name: U.S. Federal Register / 美国联邦公报

items.summary_en: The U.S. Department of Commerce has initiated a circumvention inquiry on certain corrosion-resistant steel products from China to determine if they are circumventing duties through Thailand.
items.title_en: Initiation of Circumvention Inquiry on Antidumping and Countervailing Duty Orders for Certain Corrosion-Resistant Steel Products from China
items.impact_en: If the investigation confirms circumvention, it will have significant implications for the market access of Chinese corrosion-resistant steel products, potentially leading to stricter trade restrictions.

items.title_zh: 铁和钢产品的生态设计要求
items.title_en: Ecodesign requirements for iron and steel products
items.title_original: Ecodesign requirements for iron and steel products
items.summary_zh: 该提案旨在通过引入低碳要求，促进钢铁的可持续制造和使用，符合欧盟清洁工业协议和钢铁及金属行动计划。
items.summary_en: The proposed Industrial Accelerator Act introduces low-carbon requirements for steel in public procurement and public support schemes, promoting sustainable manufacturing and use of steel.
items.impact_zh: 对中国钢厂/出口商意味着需要调整产品以符合欧盟的低碳和生态设计要求，可能影响其在欧盟市场的竞争力。
items.impact_en: For Chinese steel mills/exporters, this means they need to adjust their products to meet the EU's low-carbon and ecodesign requirements, which may affect their competitiveness in the EU market.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 第三国支付的碳价格与碳边界调整机制（CBAM）
items.title_en: Carbon price paid in a third country under the carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM)
items.title_original: Carbon price paid in a third country under the carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM)
items.summary_zh: 该倡议将规定将第三国实际支付的碳价格转换为相应数量的CBAM证书的规则，考虑到该国可用的任何补偿形式。
items.summary_en: This initiative will set out rules for the conversion into a corresponding number of CBAM certificates of the carbon price effectively paid in a third country for the declared embedded emissions.
items.impact_zh: 对中国钢厂/出口商意味着需要关注第三国的碳价格及其对CBAM证书的影响，以便在出口时进行合规。
items.impact_en: For Chinese steel mills/exporters, this means they need to pay attention to the carbon prices in third countries and their impact on CBAM certificates for compliance during exports.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 调整CBAM证书以反映欧盟ETS免费分配的规则
items.title_en: Rules on the adjustment of CBAM certificates to reflect the EU ETS free allocation
items.title_original: Rules on the adjustment of CBAM certificates to reflect the EU ETS free allocation
items.summary_zh: 该倡议将使CBAM基准值与2026-2030年期间的最终ETS基准值保持一致，以确保CBAM在其最终阶段的正常运作。
items.summary_en: This initiative will align the CBAM benchmark values in the implementing act with the final ETS benchmarks for the period 2026-2030.
items.impact_zh: 对中国钢厂/出口商意味着需要关注CBAM基准值的调整，以确保在进入欧盟市场时符合ETS的相关规定。
items.impact_en: For Chinese steel mills/exporters, this means they need to pay attention to the adjustments of CBAM benchmark values to ensure compliance with ETS regulations when entering the EU market.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: CBAM声明
items.title_en: CBAM declarations
items.title_original: CBAM declarations
items.summary_zh: 根据CBAM法规第6(6)条，委员会有权制定关于CBAM声明的实施法，该法将规定CBAM声明的标准格式和提交程序。
items.summary_en: Pursuant to Article 6(6) of the CBAM Regulation, the Commission is empowered to adopt implementing acts regarding the establishment of the CBAM declarations.
items.impact_zh: 对中国钢厂/出口商意味着需要了解CBAM声明的标准格式和提交程序，以确保在欧盟市场的合规性。
items.impact_en: For Chinese steel mills/exporters, this means they need to understand the standard format and submission procedures for CBAM declarations to ensure compliance in the EU market.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 欧盟铝行业 - 贸易措施以确保铝废料在欧盟市场的充足供应
items.title_en: EU aluminium sector – trade measure to ensure sufficient availability of aluminium scrap on the EU market
items.title_original: EU aluminium sector – trade measure to ensure sufficient availability of aluminium scrap on the EU market
items.summary_zh: 该倡议旨在解决铝行业二次原材料供应不足和价格高昂的问题。提案实施了委员会在2025年3月通过的钢铁和金属行动计划中承诺考虑对铝废料出口的贸易措施。
items.summary_en: The initiative is aimed to address the problem of insufficient availability and affordability of secondary raw materials for the aluminium sector. The proposal implements the Commission’s commitment to consider trade measures on exports of aluminium scrap as stated in the Steel and Metals Action Plan adopted in March 2025.
items.impact_zh: 对中国铝材出口商而言，欧盟可能实施的铝废料出口贸易措施将影响其在欧盟市场的竞争力，需关注后续政策动向。
items.impact_en: For Chinese aluminium exporters, the potential trade measures on aluminium scrap exports by the EU could affect their competitiveness in the EU market, necessitating close attention to subsequent policy developments.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 针对进入成员国专属经济区的货物的委员会实施条例
items.title_en: Commission Implementing Regulation for goods brought to the exclusive economic zone of Member States
items.title_original: Commission Implementing Regulation for goods brought to the exclusive economic zone of Member States
items.summary_zh: 该倡议将规定碳边界调整机制（CBAM）适用于非欧盟国家的货物的详细条件，包括提交CBAM声明的义务。
items.summary_en: This initiative will set out detailed conditions for the application of a carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM) to goods originating in a non-EU country.
items.impact_zh: 对中国钢厂/出口商意味着需要了解CBAM的适用条件，以确保在进入欧盟市场时的合规性。
items.impact_en: For Chinese steel mills/exporters, this means they need to understand the applicable conditions of CBAM to ensure compliance when entering the EU market.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: CBAM目的的认证条件
items.title_en: Conditions for granting accreditation for CBAM purposes
items.title_original: Conditions for granting accreditation for CBAM purposes
items.summary_zh: 该倡议将规定国家认证机构授予申请人CBAM目的的认证的条件，以及对认证机构的控制和监督规则。
items.summary_en: This initiative will set out the conditions for national accreditation bodies to grant requesting persons accreditation for CBAM purposes.
items.impact_zh: 对中国钢厂/出口商意味着需要关注CBAM认证的条件，以确保在进入欧盟市场时的合规性。
items.impact_en: For Chinese steel mills/exporters, this means they need to pay attention to the conditions for CBAM accreditation to ensure compliance when entering the EU market.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 应对全球过剩产能对欧盟钢铁行业负面贸易影响的贸易措施
items.title_en: Trade measure addressing the negative trade-related effects of global excess capacity on the EU steel sector
items.title_original: Trade measure addressing the negative trade-related effects of global excess capacity on the EU steel sector
items.summary_zh: 该倡议旨在采取有效措施应对全球过剩产能对欧盟钢铁行业的负面贸易影响，并为维护欧盟强大和可持续的钢铁行业做出贡献。当前的保障措施将于2026年6月30日到期。
items.summary_en: The initiative aims to have a highly effective measure to tackle the negative trade-related effects of global overcapacities and to contribute to preserving a strong and sustainable steel sector in the EU. The current safeguard measure will expire on June 30, 2026.
items.impact_zh: 此措施可能会影响中国钢铁产品在欧盟市场的准入，尤其是在全球过剩产能的背景下，可能导致更严格的贸易限制。
items.impact_en: This measure may affect the access of Chinese steel products to the EU market, particularly in the context of global overcapacity, potentially leading to stricter trade restrictions.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 碳边界调整机制（CBAM）最终期限的方法论
items.title_en: Carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM) methodology for the definitive period
items.title_original: Carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM) methodology for the definitive period
items.summary_zh: 该倡议将制定CBAM最终期限的方法论，详细说明基于实际排放的嵌入式排放计算，并制定间接排放计算方法的应用规则。
items.summary_en: This initiative will lay down the methodology for the CBAM definitive period detailing the calculation of embedded emissions based on actual emissions and setting out rules on the application of the elements of the calculation methods for indirect emissions.
items.impact_zh: 此方法论将影响中国钢铁产品在欧盟市场的碳成本计算，可能导致额外的合规成本。
items.impact_en: This methodology will affect the carbon cost calculations for Chinese steel products in the EU market, potentially leading to additional compliance costs.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 调整CBAM证书的交付义务以考虑ETS免费配额的逐步取消
items.title_en: Adjustment of the obligation to surrender CBAM certificates to take account of ETS free allowances phase-out
items.title_original: Adjustment of the obligation to surrender CBAM certificates to take account of ETS free allowances phase-out
items.summary_zh: 该倡议详细规定了如何调整CBAM证书的交付义务，以反映欧盟排放交易体系（ETS）免费配额的逐步取消。
items.summary_en: This initiative down detailed rules on how carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM) certificates to be surrendered by authorised CBAM declarants shall be adjusted to reflect the extent to which EU emission trading schemes (ETS) allowances are allocated free of charge.
items.impact_zh: 此调整可能会影响中国钢铁产品的合规要求，增加进入欧盟市场的复杂性。
items.impact_en: This adjustment may affect the compliance requirements for Chinese steel products, increasing the complexity of entering the EU market.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 将碳边界调整机制的范围扩展至下游产品及反规避措施
items.title_en: Extension of the scope of the carbon border adjustment mechanism to downstream products and anti-circumvention measures
items.title_original: Extension of the scope of the carbon border adjustment mechanism to downstream products and anti-circumvention measures
items.summary_zh: 该倡议旨在将碳边界调整机制（CBAM）的范围扩展至一些下游产品，以减少碳泄漏的风险。
items.summary_en: The initiative aims at extending the carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM) scope to some downstream products to reduce the risk of carbon leakage.
items.impact_zh: 此扩展可能会影响中国钢铁产品的市场准入，特别是如果下游产品受到更严格的碳成本要求。
items.impact_en: This extension may affect the market access of Chinese steel products, especially if downstream products are subject to stricter carbon cost requirements.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 印度钢企转向本土市场，印度对中日俄热轧钢启动反倾销调查
items.title_original: Indian steelmakers pivot home as Europe tightens imports, China squeezes margins
items.summary_zh: 路透社报道，欧英收紧钢铁进口规则、低价中国钢材压缩利润，促使印度钢企更多转向国内市场。报道同时提到，印度已对来自中国、日本和俄罗斯的热轧钢进口启动反倾销调查。
items.impact_zh: 中国热轧出口印度面临新增贸易救济风险；在立案文件公布后，应优先核对调查期、涉案税号、产品排除和应诉节点。

source.name: Reuters

items.summary_en: Reuters reports that tightening steel import rules in Europe and low-priced Chinese steel are prompting Indian steelmakers to turn more towards the domestic market. The report also mentions that India has initiated an antidumping investigation on hot-rolled steel imports from China, Japan, and Russia.
items.title_en: Indian Steelmakers Pivot Home as Europe Tightens Imports and China Squeezes Margins
items.impact_en: Chinese hot-rolled steel exports to India face new trade remedy risks; after the filing documents are published, priority should be given to verifying the investigation period, involved tax numbers, product exclusions, and response timelines.

items.title_zh: 检查您是否需要为碳边界调整机制（CBAM）注册
items.title_en: Check if you’ll need to register for Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
items.title_original: Check if you’ll need to register for Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
items.summary_zh: 从2027年1月1日起，检查您在进口特定CBAM商品时是否需要注册。
items.summary_en: Find out if you need to register for CBAM when you import selected CBAM goods from 1 January 2027.
items.impact_zh: 中国钢铁出口商需关注注册要求，以避免因未注册而面临罚款。
items.impact_en: Chinese steel exporters need to pay attention to registration requirements to avoid penalties for non-registration.

source.name: GOV.UK / 英国政府

items.title_zh: 碳边界调整机制（CBAM）：政策摘要
items.title_en: Carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM): Policy summary
items.title_original: Carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM): Policy summary
items.summary_zh: 该文件提供了CBAM政策的摘要，包括核心政策框架和相关立法细节。
items.summary_en: This document provides a summary of CBAM policy, including the core policy framework and relevant legislative details.
items.impact_zh: 了解CBAM政策框架将帮助中国钢铁企业更好地应对未来的市场变化。
items.impact_en: Understanding the CBAM policy framework will help Chinese steel companies better respond to future market changes.

source.name: GOV.UK / 英国政府

items.title_zh: 进口的碳边界调整（CBAM）商品可能不计入注册门槛
items.title_en: Imported Carbon Border Adjustment (CBAM) goods that may not contribute towards the registration threshold
items.title_original: Imported Carbon Border Adjustment (CBAM) goods that may not contribute towards the registration threshold
items.summary_zh: 了解哪些进口的CBAM商品可能不计入注册门槛，特别是英国原产的商品。
items.summary_en: Find out which imported CBAM goods may not contribute towards the registration threshold, especially those of UK origin.
items.impact_zh: 中国钢铁出口商需关注原产地规则，以确保合规并优化成本。
items.impact_en: Chinese steel exporters need to pay attention to origin rules to ensure compliance and optimize costs.

source.name: GOV.UK / 英国政府

items.title_zh: 检查哪些商品在碳边界调整机制（CBAM）范围内
items.title_en: Check which goods are in scope of Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
items.title_original: Check which goods are in scope of Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
items.summary_zh: 检查从铝、水泥、化肥、氢气、钢铁行业进口的商品是否在CBAM税收范围内。
items.summary_en: Check whether goods imported from the aluminium, cement, fertiliser, hydrogen, and steel sectors are in scope of the CBAM tax.
items.impact_zh: 中国钢铁出口商需确认其产品是否在CBAM范围内，以便进行适当的市场策略调整。
items.impact_en: Chinese steel exporters need to confirm whether their products fall within the scope of CBAM to make appropriate market strategy adjustments.

source.name: GOV.UK / 英国政府

items.title_zh: 为碳边界调整机制（CBAM）保留记录
items.title_en: Keeping records for Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
items.title_original: Keeping records for Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
items.summary_zh: 了解作为CBAM商品进口商需要保留的记录。
items.summary_en: Find out which records you must keep if you're the importer of CBAM goods.
items.impact_zh: 中国钢铁出口商需建立完善的记录保存机制，以确保合规并避免潜在的罚款。
items.impact_en: Chinese steel exporters need to establish a robust record-keeping mechanism to ensure compliance and avoid potential penalties.

source.name: GOV.UK / 英国政府

items.title_zh: 碳边界调整机制：法律效力通知和参考文件
items.title_en: Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism: force of law notice and reference document
items.title_original: Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism: force of law notice and reference document
items.summary_zh: 了解碳边界调整机制的法律效力通知及相关参考文件。
items.summary_en: Find out about the force of law notice for the Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism and reference document.
items.impact_zh: 中国钢铁企业需关注法律效力的变化，以便及时调整合规策略。
items.impact_en: Chinese steel companies need to pay attention to changes in legal force to adjust compliance strategies in a timely manner.

source.name: GOV.UK / 英国政府

items.title_zh: 救助与重组指南的修订
items.title_en: Revision of the Rescue and Restructuring Guidelines
items.title_original: Revision of the Rescue and Restructuring Guidelines
items.summary_zh: 欧洲委员会目前正在修订救助与重组（R&R）指南，旨在将钢铁行业纳入指南的适用范围。
items.summary_en: The European Commission is currently revising the Rescue and Restructuring (R&R) Guidelines. The initiative seeks to include the steel sector in the material scope of the Guidelines.
items.impact_zh: 此修订可能为中国钢铁企业提供更多的国家援助机会，改善其在欧盟市场的竞争力。
items.impact_en: This revision may provide more state aid opportunities for Chinese steel companies, improving their competitiveness in the EU market.

source.name: EC Have Your Say / 欧盟公众咨询

items.title_zh: 中国钢铁上半年产量下降，但6月日产水平显示韧性
items.title_original: China's steel sector looks weaker than it is, reverse for iron ore
items.summary_zh: 路透社分析称，中国2026年上半年钢产量同比下降约3%，地产需求仍弱；但6月粗钢产量为8,367万吨、日产水平升至三个月高位。铁矿石进口保持强劲，显示生产端并非单向走弱。
items.impact_zh: 国内需求偏弱仍会推动钢厂寻找出口，但短期生产韧性可能延续海外市场的供给与价格压力，并提高各国采取贸易措施的概率。

source.name: Reuters

items.summary_en: According to Reuters, China's steel production in the first half of 2026 decreased by about 3% year-on-year, with weak demand from the real estate sector; however, crude steel production in June reached 83.67 million tons, with daily output rising to a three-month high. Iron ore imports remain strong, indicating that production is not solely weakening.
items.title_en: China's Steel Production Declines in H1, June Daily Output Shows Resilience
items.impact_en: Weak domestic demand will still drive steel mills to seek exports, but short-term production resilience may prolong supply and price pressures in overseas markets, increasing the likelihood of trade measures being taken by various countries.

items.title_zh: 中国钢材出口创纪录，但后续订单与贸易摩擦或压制涨势
items.title_original: China's steel exports hit record but rally may prove short-lived
items.summary_zh: 标普全球报道，中国钢材出口达到纪录水平，其中钢坯出口同比显著增长；但订单走弱以及2026年反倾销案件增加，可能使第三季度出口动能放缓。
items.impact_zh: 出口量越高，越容易触发进口国行业申诉和调查。钢厂应提前按市场、品种和客户监测订单下滑与立案风险，避免集中发运。

source.name: S&P Global Commodity Insights

items.summary_en: S&P Global reports that China's steel exports have reached record levels, with significant year-on-year growth in semi-finished steel exports; however, weakening orders and an increase in anti-dumping cases in 2026 may slow export momentum in the third quarter.
items.title_en: China's Steel Exports Hit Record but Rally May Prove Short-Lived
items.impact_en: The higher the export volume, the more likely it is to trigger complaints and investigations from importing countries. Steel mills should monitor order declines and filing risks in advance based on market, variety, and customer to avoid concentrated shipments.

items.title_zh: 敬业集团就英国接管British Steel寻求补偿并考虑仲裁
items.title_original: Chinese company demands compensation from the UK over British Steel nationalization
items.summary_zh: 美联社报道，敬业集团因英国政府接管British Steel运营而要求补偿，并正依据双边投资安排磋商、考虑国际仲裁。英国方面表示将通过独立评估确定可能的补偿。
items.impact_zh: 事件不仅影响敬业集团资产处置，也会提高中资钢铁企业评估英国投资时对政府干预、关键产能认定及投资协定保护条款的关注。

source.name: Associated Press

items.summary_en: According to the Associated Press, Jingye Group is seeking compensation from the UK government for the takeover of British Steel operations and is negotiating based on bilateral investment arrangements, considering international arbitration. The UK side stated that it would determine possible compensation through an independent assessment.
items.title_en: Chinese Company Demands Compensation from the UK over British Steel Nationalization
items.impact_en: This event not only affects Jingye Group's asset disposal but also raises concerns among Chinese steel companies regarding government intervention, key capacity identification, and investment agreement protection clauses when evaluating investments in the UK.

items.title_zh: 来自中国的某些活性炭：反倾销税行政审查的初步结果及部分撤销
items.title_en: Certain Activated Carbon From the People's Republic of China: Preliminary Results and Rescission, in Part, of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review; 2024-2025
items.title_original: Certain Activated Carbon From the People's Republic of China: Preliminary Results and Rescission, in Part, of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review; 2024-2025
items.summary_zh: 美国商务部初步确定，部分中国企业在审查期间以低于正常价值销售活性炭。
items.summary_en: The U.S. Department of Commerce preliminarily determines that certain Chinese companies sold activated carbon at less than normal value during the review period.
items.impact_zh: 这可能影响中国活性炭的出口策略，但与钢铁行业直接关联不大。
items.impact_en: This may affect the export strategy for Chinese activated carbon, but it is not directly related to the steel industry.

source.name: U.S. Federal Register / 美国联邦公报
